unsupported_features.comment: DOM mutation order — pipeline routes through <page> root, producing different mutation sequences
Lynx environment does not provide MutationObserver

tests: should not render falsy values
should render NaN as text content
should clear falsy attributes
should not render falsy attributes on hydrate
skip_list.comment: JSON.stringify(NaN) → null — NaN is lost in BSI→patch IPC serialization

tests: should render bigint as text content
skip_list.comment: JSON.stringify(BigInt) throws — BigInt cannot cross BSI→patch IPC boundary

tests: should serialize object props as attributes
skip_list.comment: JSON.stringify strips custom toString() — object identity lost in IPC serialization

tests: should keep c.base up to date if a nested child component changes DOM nodes
should not update sibling c.base if child component changes DOM nodes
should not update parent c.base if child component changes DOM nodes and it is not first child component
should update parent c.base if child component changes DOM nodes and it is first non-null child component
should not update parent c.base if child component changes DOM nodes and a parent is not first child component
should update parent c.base if first child becomes null
should update parent c.base if first child becomes non-null
should update parent c.base if first non-null child becomes null with multiple null siblings
should update parent c.base if a null child returns DOM with multiple null siblings
should update parent c.base to null if last child becomes null
should update parent c.base if last child returns dom
should not update parent if it is a DOM node
skip_list.comment: component.base returns BSI (background thread), not a DOM node

tests: should clear falsy input values
should set enumerable boolean attribute
should allow setting contentEditable to false
should not clear falsy DOM properties
should mask value on password input elements
should allow <input list /> to pass through as an attribute
should not throw when changing contentEditable to undefined or null
should support subsequent renders w/ defaultValue
should support subsequent renders w/ defaultChecked
skip_list.comment: Web DOM IDL properties (value, checked, contentEditable, spellcheck, …) — Preact does dom[prop]=val but BSI has no IDL property, causing a different code path in setProperty()

tests: should set checked attribute on custom elements without checked property
should support false aria-* attributes
should re-render nested components
skip_list.comment: Boolean-to-attribute serialization convention (true→'' vs 'true', false→remove vs 'false') — web-specific behavior not relevant to Lynx Element PAPI

tests: should not execute append operation when child is at last
should always diff `checked` and `value` properties against the DOM
skip_list.comment: Refs return BSI, not DOM node — tests call ref.focus(), ref.value, etc.

tests: should accurately call nested setState callbacks
skip_list.comment: Pipeline timing — componentDidMount reads scratch before pipeline syncs output to container

tests: should render functional components
should render components with props
should not serialize function props as attributes
should initialize props & context but not state in Component constructor
compiler_skip_list.comment: Compiler serializes event handlers as attributes (e.g. onbaz="2:0:onBaz") and changes render() return signature — tests assert on exact innerHTML or spy on render calls

tests: should render components
should render components that don't call Component constructor
should render components that don't call Component constructor and don't initialize state
should render components that don't inherit from Component
should render components that don't inherit from Component (unistore pattern)
should render components that don't inherit from Component and don't initialize state
should render components that don't pass args into the Component constructor (unistore pattern)
should render Component classes that don't pass args into the Component constructor
should render nested functional components
should skip shouldComponentUpdate when called during render
compiler_skip_list.comment: Compiler changes component render return value (snapshot type instead of raw vnode) — spy-based assertions on render() return value fail

tests: should be a VNode with a DOM node child
should be an array with multiple children
should be ignored when explicit children exist
should render sibling array children
should render first child Fragment that wrap null components
should support passing children as a prop
should update children props correctly in subsequent renders
should allow for updates of props
should allow VNode reuse
Should retain content when parent rerenders when deeper children are subscribed
should keep the right context at the right "depth"
should break through strict equality optimization
should preserve order for fragment switching
should preserve order for nested fragment switching
should preserve order for nested fragment switching w/ child return
should swap nested fragments correctly
should not crash or repeatedly add the same child when replacing a matched vnode with null
should not crash or repeatedly add the same child when replacing a matched vnode with null (mixed dom-types)
should maintain order when setting state (that inserts dom-elements)
should shift keyed lists with wrapping fragment-like children
should reorder child pairs
should remove keyed nodes (#232)
should not preserve state when keys change with multiple children
should not preserve state when switching between keyed and unkeyed components as children
should preserve state when moving keyed children components
should retain state for inserted children
should properly render Components that return Fragments and use shouldComponentUpdate #1415
should preserve provider context between different providers
should preserve provider context through nesting providers
compiler_skip_list.comment: Compiler wraps text expressions in <wrapper> elements — innerHTML shows <wrapper>text</wrapper> instead of bare text. Also affects fragment/keyed reorder assertions that compare exact DOM structure

tests: should support the translate attribute w/ false as a boolean
should support the translate attribute w/ true as a boolean
should support popover true boolean
should support popover false boolean
compiler_skip_list.comment: Compiler handles boolean attributes differently — values are baked into snapshot create() instead of going through setProperty/setAttribute path

tests: should keep value of uncontrolled checkboxes
should keep value of uncontrolled inputs
should not emit when value does not update
compiler_skip_list.comment: Compiler-generated snapshots don't set DOM IDL properties (value, checked) — these go through snapshot values array instead of direct dom[prop]=val

tests: should handle hole prepend
should handle hole replace
should handle hole insert
should handle hole apppend
compiler_skip_list.comment: Compiler changes component identity — keyed hole operations cause extra mount/unmount cycles due to snapshot type changes

tests: should reconcile mutated DOM attributes
should remove attributes on pre-existing DOM
permanent_skip_list.comment: Test mutates or pre-populates jsdom directly — BSI has no access to main-thread DOM state

tests: should support the <template> tag
permanent_skip_list.comment: BSI has no .content DocumentFragment — web-specific <template> API

tests: should reorder Fragment children
permanent_skip_list.comment: BSI .type field collision — type set as JS property instead of setAttribute, breaking diff

tests: handle shuffled (stress test)
permanent_skip_list.comment: Exceeds 5s timeout due to pipeline overhead per commit
